headline: Founder and CEO of Be in, building flexible and built-to-suit workplace offerings across Brazil.
title: Founder & CEO
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, SiiLA coverage, and podcast/social sources consistently identify him as founder/CEO of Be in.
bioMarkdown: Founder and CEO of Be in, a Brazilian workplace company focused on flexible offices, built-to-suit spaces, and Workspace as a Service. Useful match for conversations on commercial real estate, workplace flexibility, occupancy models, and scaling service-heavy physical businesses.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Identifies Nikolas Matarangas as founder at Be in and managing director at Okto Partners.

secondary.label: SiiLA article
secondary.note: Profiles him as founder and CEO of Be in and describes Be in's expansion across 12 Brazilian states.

secondary.label: Woba Convida YouTube episode
secondary.note: Interview episode featuring Nikolas Matarangas of Be in discussing office and coworking themes.

headline: Principal Software Engineering Manager at Microsoft focused on Azure Storage and data protection.
title: Principal Software Engineering Manager
confidenceNote: LinkedIn and public LinkedIn posts match the Microsoft Azure Storage role; independent non-LinkedIn corroboration is limited.
bioMarkdown: Principal Software Engineering Manager at Microsoft working around Azure Storage. Relevant for attendees interested in cloud infrastructure, storage durability, backup, engineering leadership, and operating large-scale platform services.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists him as Principal Software Engineering Manager at Microsoft, focused on Azure Storage.

primary.label: LinkedIn post
primary.note: Post from his profile about Azure Data Lake Storage vaulted backup.

secondary.label: Azure Weekly issue
secondary.note: Mentions a Nilay Shah MSDN post in Microsoft developer tooling context.

headline: Co-founder of Struct, building an autonomous on-call engineer for incident response.
title: Co-founder
confidenceNote: YC, LinkedIn, GitHub, and X sources consistently match the Struct founder profile.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder of Struct, a YC-backed developer tools startup building an autonomous on-call engineer that cross-references logs, metrics, traces, and code to investigate incidents. Good match for AI agents, observability, reliability, DevOps workflows, and startup building.

primary.label: Y Combinator company profile
primary.note: Lists Nimesh Chakravarthi as a founder of Struct and describes the product as an on-call automation platform.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Identifies him as Co-Founder at Struct (YC F24) and ex-LinkedIn.

primary.label: GitHub profile
primary.note: Personal developer profile says founder at struct.ai.

secondary.label: X profile
secondary.note: Public profile lists San Francisco, Struct website, and co-founder role.

headline: Director of Engineering at Amplitude and founding engineer focused on analytics, AI products, and distributed systems.
title: Director of Engineering
confidenceNote: Personal site, Amplitude author pages, and LinkedIn all connect him to Amplitude engineering leadership.
bioMarkdown: Founding engineer at Amplitude and Director of Engineering working across AI products and core analytics capabilities. Relevant for conversations on product analytics, distributed systems, query engines, LLM-powered analytics, and scaling engineering teams from early stage to public company.

primary.note: States he was Amplitude's first engineer and helped grow the company into a public business.

primary.label: Amplitude blog author context
primary.note: Describes him as a founding engineer and Director of Engineering leading AI products and core analytics capabilities.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists Director of Engineering at Amplitude and describes leadership of core analytics engineering.

secondary.label: TechCrunch author page
secondary.note: Identifies him as a long-tenured Amplitude engineering leader.

headline: Founder and Executive Director at Infocusp with a long-running AI, computer science, and product engineering background.
title: Founder / Executive Director

bioMarkdown: Founder and Executive Director at Infocusp, with experience in AI research, machine learning, and entrepreneurial technology leadership. Useful match for applied AI, engineering services, product development, and scaling technical teams.

headline: Co-founder and CTO of Skillsync, applying open-source signals and AI to technical hiring.
title: Co-founder & CTO
confidenceNote: YC, LinkedIn, and GitHub sources consistently identify him as Skillsync co-founder/CTO in San Francisco.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and CTO of Skillsync, a YC startup focused on finding engineers from shipped work, code, and open-source contributions rather than traditional resumes. Good match for technical hiring, open-source talent signals, Rust, developer data, and AI recruiting workflows.

primary.label: Y Combinator company profile
primary.note: Lists Nishant Joshi as a founder of Skillsync and describes the company as hiring engineers based on what they have shipped.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Identifies him as Co-Founder CTO at Skillsync (YC W26) in San Francisco.

primary.label: GitHub profile
primary.note: Public developer profile links to Skillsync, San Francisco, personal site, X, and LinkedIn.

secondary.label: Forbes Technology Council profile
secondary.note: Lists Nishant Joshi with Skillsync Inc.
